name: Paper 1 · 引导分析
subject: english
domain_name: 评估任务 / Assessment Components / Assessment
curriculum_points: Students will be able to write a coherent, analytical essay in response to an unseen literary or non-literary text, guided by a provided prompt, within a timed examination setting.
Students will be able to select and analyse salient features of the text (both linguistic and stylistic), building a sustained argument that addresses the guiding question.
